title: Need to support adding signatures when committing or pushing
body: Similar in some ways to #96, we need to be able to add signatures to images when writing them.

comments.body: @TomSweeneyRedHat I think could use something like this for OpenShift?
Closing this as we're tracking in Trello at: https://trello.com/c/CsSZ1z8W/827-buildah-support-adding-signatures-when-committing-or-pushing
